title: PlayerRevive
description: Revive a player by pressing sneak
body:
# Revive your friends
Requires **Java 21**. See [here](https://docs.papermc.io/misc/java-install) how to update your installed Java version.

## What is PlayerRevive?

- This plugin grants you a second chance right before death! Instead of dying instantly, you enter a "Downed" state where you can still move around freely. However, be careful—if your time runs out, you will die for real.

## Features
- Supports Paper/Folia 1.21.x

## Downloads
- [Releases](https://github.com/amapekibert/PlayerRevive/releases)
